top_signals.title: Congo’s Ebola Footprint Widens as Officials Race to Gauge Epidemic’s True Scale
top_signals.summary: Congo’s Ebola outbreak is being detected across a widening swath of the country’s conflict-hit east as health authorities struggle to trace exposed contacts and determine the true scale of the epidemic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Billionaire behind Japan’s tiny-room hotel empire bets on U.S.
top_signals.summary: APA Hotels has grown into one of Japan's most recognizable hotel operators, with more than 1,100 hotels and nearly 150,000 rooms across its global network.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rio starts $1.5B expansion of Quebec aluminum smelter
top_signals.summary: AP60 is among the lowest-carbon aluminum smelting technologies operating at commercial scale, Rio said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: WP Maps Pro bug exploited to create admin accounts on WordPress sites
top_signals.summary: Hackers are targeting WordPress websites running a vulnerable version of the WP Maps Pro plugin, which allows creating rogue administrator accounts without authentication. [...]
